name: Design for Manufacture
title: EGB125
desc: Explores the relationship between design, manufacturing processes, and material properties.

name: Engineering Mechanics
title: EGB121
desc: Foundational unit in statics and mechanics of materials for analyzing structures like cranes and bridges.

name: Foundations of Electrical Eng.
title: EGB120
desc: Introduces circuit analysis, measurement instruments, and practical applications of electrical energy.

name: Eng. Mathematics & Statistics
title: MZB127
desc: Covers multivariable calculus, differential equations, linear algebra, and statistics.

name: Materials and Manufacturing
title: EGB214
desc: Introduces engineering materials and how processing affects properties.

name: Solid Mechanics
title: EGB314
desc: Intermediate study of internal stresses and strains in solid bodies.

name: Fluid Mechanics
title: EGB323
desc: Fundamentals of fluid flows, hydrostatics, and energy/momentum equations.

name: Advanced Eng. Mathematics
title: MZB221
desc: Integral transforms, calculus, and linear algebra for engineering applications.

name: Fundamentals of Mechanical Design
title: EGB210
desc: Integrating mechanics, solids, fluids, and materials into systematic design.

name: Thermodynamics
title: EGB322
desc: Thermodynamic principles applied to engines, power plants, and refrigeration.

name: Dynamics
title: EGB211
desc: Motion of particles and rigid bodies for machines and vehicles.

name: 2x 6CP Options
title: QUT YOU
desc: Two 6-credit point university-wide modules.

name: Engineering Design & Prof. Practice
title: EGB101
desc: Introduces the engineering design process, technical analysis, and professional attributes like ethics and teamwork.

name: Fundamentals of Eng. Science
title: EGB102
desc: Introduces core concepts of physics and strength of materials (forces, motion, energy, stress, strain).

name: Computing and Data for Engineers
title: EGB103
desc: Teaches design and implementation of simple algorithms to solve engineering problems and automate tasks.

name: Introductory Eng. Mathematics
title: MZB125
desc: Covers elementary functions, derivatives, integrals, complex numbers, vectors, and matrices.

name: Minor Unit
title: Minor 3
desc: Third unit of your chosen minor.

name: Stress Analysis
title: EGH414
desc: Response of components to loads and use of Finite Element Method (ANSYS).

name: Vibration and Control
title: EGH421
desc: Analysis and control of dynamic behavior and PID controller design.

name: Research Project 1
title: EGH490-1
desc: Capstone unit involving independent research and project management.

name: Minor Unit
title: Minor 4
desc: Fourth unit of your chosen minor.

name: Work Placement Experience
title: EGB499
desc: Capstone professional practice unit. Report submission after 450 hours of placement.

name: Heat Transfer
title: EGH422
desc: Fundamentals of conduction, convection, radiation, and mass diffusion.

name: Fluid Dynamics
title: EGH423
desc: Viscous, transient flows; pumps and turbines; CFD.

name: Research Project 2
title: EGH490-2
desc: Continuation of independent research.

name: Design of Machine Elements
title: EGB316
desc: Advanced design analysis using standards and Finite Element Analysis (ANSYS).

name: Minor Unit
title: Minor 1
desc: First unit of your chosen minor.

name: Dynamics of Machines
title: EGB321
desc: Dynamics and vibration of machines, position/velocity analysis.

name: 2x 6CP Options
title: QUT YOU
desc: Two 6-credit point university-wide modules.

name: Mechanical Systems Design
title: EGH420
desc: Final design unit analyzing complex systems (safety, ethics, sustainability).

name: Extension Unit Option
title: Discipline
desc: Discipline specific extension unit.

name: Minor Unit
title: Minor 2
desc: Second unit of your chosen minor.

name: Research in Eng. Practice
title: EGH404
desc: Engineering research methods, literature review, and data visualization.
